message:
🐛 Make MissionBrowser background fully solid (#1489)

- Change outer container from bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-sm to bg-background
- Remove transparency from sidebar (bg-card/50 → bg-card) and filter bar (bg-card/80 → bg-card)
- Add bg-background to right content panel

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
